3241170.name: くにゃ〜むソーダ〜meown soda float〜
3241170.description:
In the beginning

.A cute cat is trying to make a cream soda!
Work together with the cat to add more and more decorations!
Stick the decorations dropped on the soda and make vanilla ice cream to create the perfect cream soda!

Game Overview

.This game is a 2D puzzle game with a new sensation of floating objects.

This game is for solo play.

During the game, you can drop decorations into the soda. If you bump the same decoration against each other, it will change to the next decoration. Each time a decoration changes, your score will increase, so aim for a high score!
... However, be careful not to drop the decoration from the cup, because your record will end there!
